---
title: "data_ingestion"
author: "Shenyi Jiang"
date: "2026-01-23"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
```

```{r}
# import data
data_raw <- read_csv(
  "preliminarydata.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

names(data_raw)
```

```{r}
# clean data
data_raw <- data_raw %>% clean_names()
names(data_raw)[1:15]

data_raw <- data_raw %>% select(-x1)
```

```{r}
# wide table to long table
meta_cols <- c(
  "unique_code", "s_c", "s_sc", "s_l", "s_s", 
  "longitude", "latitude", "year", "season"
)

data_long <- data_raw %>% pivot_longer(
  cols = -all_of(meta_cols),
  names_to = "taxon",
  values_to = "abundance"
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(abundance), abundance > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.integer(year),
    abundance = as.numeric(abundance),
    taxon = str_replace(taxon, "1$", "")
  ) 

glimpse(data_long)
count(data_long, taxon, sort = TRUE) %>% head(10)
range(data_long$year, na.rm = TRUE)

```

```{r}
# total abundance + taxa richness
annual_state <- data_long %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(
    total_abundance = sum(abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    taxa_richness = n_distinct(taxon),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
head(annual_state)
summary(annual_state)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

annual_long <- annual_state %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(total_abundance, taxa_richness),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  )

ggplot(annual_long, aes(x=year, y=value)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) + 
  facet_wrap(~ metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  labs(
    title = "Annual Ecological State of the California Current (Ichthyoplankton)",
    x = "year", y = "value"
  )
```
